properties.entry: MERGE INTO `{projectId}.expandocolumn` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'className' ) AS className, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'columnId' ) AS columnId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'dataType' ) AS dataType, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.expando.kernel.model.ExpandoColumn' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.columnId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.className = staging.className, replica.dataType = staging.dataType, replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `className`, `columnId`, `dataSourceId`, `dataType`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `projectId` ) VALUES ( staging.className, staging.columnId, staging.dataSourceId, staging.dataType, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.projectId )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.expandovalue` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', columnId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity`, UNNEST(expandoFields) WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND ( type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Organization' OR type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.User' ) ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.classPK AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.columnId = replica.columnId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.value = staging.value WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `classPK`, `classType`, `columnId`, `dataSourceId`, `id`, `projectId`, `value` ) VALUES ( staging.classPK, staging.type, staging.columnId, staging.dataSourceId, staging.sha256HexId, staging.projectId, staging.value )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.group` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'groupId' ) AS groupId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Group' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.groupId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `dataSourceId`, `groupId`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `projectId` ) VALUES ( staging.dataSourceId, staging.groupId, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.projectId )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.organization` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT ARRAY( SELECT DISTINCT columnId FROM UNNEST(expandoFields) ) ) AS expandoColumnIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'organizationId' ) AS organizationId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'type' ) AS organizationType, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'parentOrganizationId' ) AS parentOrganizationId, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'treePath' ) AS treePath FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Organization' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.organizationId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.expandoColumnIds = staging.expandoColumnIds, replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name, replica.type = staging.organizationType, replica.parentOrganizationId = staging.parentOrganizationId, replica.treePath = staging.treePath WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `dataSourceId`, `expandoColumnIds`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `organizationId`, `parentOrganizationId`, `projectId`, `treePath`, `type` ) VALUES ( staging.dataSourceId, staging.expandoColumnIds, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.organizationId, staging.parentOrganizationId, staging.projectId, staging.treePath, staging.organizationType )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.role` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'roleId' ) AS roleId, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Role' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.roleId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `dataSourceId`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `projectId`, `roleId` ) VALUES ( staging.dataSourceId, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.projectId, staging.roleId )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.team` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'groupId' ) AS groupId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'teamId' ) AS teamId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Team' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.teamId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.groupId = staging.groupId, replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `dataSourceId`, `groupId`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `projectId`, `teamId` ) VALUES ( staging.dataSourceId, staging.groupId, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.projectId, staging.teamId )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.usergroup` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'name' ) AS name, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'userGroupId' ) AS userGroupId FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.Team' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.userGroupId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.name = staging.name WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `dataSourceId`, `id`, `modifiedDate`, `name`, `projectId`, `userGroupId` ) VALUES ( staging.dataSourceId, staging.sha256HexId, staging.modifiedDate, staging.name, staging.projectId, staging.userGroupId )

MERGE INTO `{projectId}.user` AS replica USING ( SELECT *, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'accountId' ) AS accountId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS TIMESTAMP) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'birthday' ) AS birthday, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'classNameId' ) AS classNameId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'contactId' ) AS contactId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS TIMESTAMP) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'createDate' ) AS createDate, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'emailAddress' ) AS emailAddress, ( SELECT ARRAY( SELECT DISTINCT columnId FROM UNNEST(expandoFields) ) ) AS expandoColumnIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'firstName' ) AS firstName, ( SELECT ARRAY ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(number AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(arrayField.groupIds) AS number ) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(value) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'groupIds' ) groupIds ) arrayField ) AS groupIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'jobTitle' ) AS jobTitle, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'languageId' ) AS languageId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'lastName' ) AS lastName, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS BOOL) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'male' ) AS male, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'middleName' ) AS middleName, ( SELECT ARRAY ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(number AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(arrayField.organizationIds) AS number ) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(value) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'organizationIds' ) organizationIds ) arrayField ) AS organizationIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'parentContactId' ) AS parentContactId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'prefixId' ) AS prefixId, ( SELECT ARRAY ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(number AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(arrayField.roleIds) AS number ) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(value) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'roleIds' ) roleIds ) arrayField ) AS roleIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'screenName' ) AS screenName, TO_HEX( SHA256( CONCAT(projectId, '#', dataSourceId, '#', classPK) ) ) AS sha256HexId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'suffixId' ) AS suffixId, ( SELECT ARRAY ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(number AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(arrayField.teamIds) AS number ) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(value) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'teamIds' ) teamIds ) arrayField ) AS teamIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'timeZoneId' ) AS timeZoneId, ( SELECT ARRAY ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(number AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(arrayField.userGroupIds) AS number ) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT JSON_EXTRACT_ARRAY(value) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'userGroupIds' ) userGroupIds ) arrayField ) AS userGroupIds, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS INT64) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'userId' ) AS userId, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'userName' ) AS userName, ( SELECT SAFE_CAST(value AS STRING) FROM UNNEST(fields) WHERE name = 'uuid' ) AS uuid FROM `{projectId}.dxpentity` WHERE uploadDate >= '{previousRunDateString}' AND type = 'com.liferay.portal.kernel.model.User' ) AS staging ON staging.classPK = replica.userId AND staging.dataSourceId = replica.dataSourceId AND staging.projectId = replica.projectId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET replica.accountId = staging.accountId, replica.birthday = staging.birthday, replica.emailAddress = staging.emailAddress, replica.emailAddressHashed = TO_HEX(SHA256(staging.emailAddress)), replica.expandoColumnIds = staging.expandoColumnIds, replica.firstName = staging.firstName, replica.groupIds = staging.groupIds, replica.jobTitle = staging.jobTitle, replica.languageId = staging.languageId, replica.lastName = staging.lastName, replica.male = staging.male, replica.middleName = staging.middleName, replica.modifiedDate = staging.modifiedDate, replica.organizationIds = staging.organizationIds, replica.parentContactId = staging.parentContactId, replica.prefixId = staging.prefixId, replica.roleIds = staging.roleIds, replica.screenName = staging.screenName, replica.suffixId = staging.suffixId, replica.teamIds = staging.teamIds, replica.timeZoneId = staging.timeZoneId, replica.userGroupIds = staging.userGroupIds, replica.userName = staging.userName WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT ( `accountId`, `birthday`, `classNameId`, `classPK`, `contactId`, `createDate`, `dataSourceId`, `emailAddress`, `emailAddressHashed`, `expandoColumnIds`, `firstName`, `groupIds`, `id`, `jobTitle`, `languageId`, `lastName`, `male`, `middleName`, `modifiedDate`, `organizationIds`, `parentContactId`, `prefixId`, `projectId`, `roleIds`, `screenName`, `suffixId`, `teamIds`, `timeZoneId`, `userGroupIds`, `userId`, `userName`, `uuid` ) VALUES ( staging.accountId, staging.birthday, staging.classNameId, staging.classPK, staging.contactId, staging.createDate, staging.dataSourceId, staging.emailAddress, TO_HEX(SHA256(staging.emailAddress)), staging.expandoColumnIds, staging.firstName, staging.groupIds, staging.sha256HexId, staging.jobTitle, staging.languageId, staging.lastName, staging.male, staging.middleName, staging.modifiedDate, staging.organizationIds, staging.parentContactId, staging.prefixId, staging.projectId, staging.roleIds, staging.screenName, staging.suffixId, staging.teamIds, staging.timeZoneId, staging.userGroupIds, staging.userId, staging.userName, staging.uuid )
